mapper.select: SELECT 'safetyAndHealthInfoRegister' AS title ,'/SafetyAndHealthInfoRegister' AS route ,'safetyAndHealthInfoRegisterDesc' AS description , case when safetyAndHealthInfoRegister.exist then 'Y' else 'N' end as activeYn FROM ( SELECT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM esg.tb_safety_health_info_register tshir WHERE tshir.comp_id = #{compId} AND tshir.write_year = #{searchText} ) as exist ) AS safetyAndHealthInfoRegister UNION all SELECT 'mySafetyAndHealthInfoRegister' AS title ,'/MySafetyAndHealthInfoRegister' AS route ,'mySafetyAndHealthInfoRegisterDesc' AS description , case when safetyAndHealthInfoRegister.exist then 'Y' else 'N' end as activeYn FROM ( SELECT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM esg.tb_safety_health_info_register tshir WHERE tshir.comp_id = #{compId} AND tshir.write_year = #{searchText} ) as exist ) AS safetyAndHealthInfoRegister UNION ALL SELECT 'safetyAndHealthCommPlan' AS title ,'/SafetyAndHealthCommPlan' AS route ,'safetyAndHealthCommPlanDesc' AS description , CASE WHEN safetyAndHealthCommPlan.exist THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS activeYn FROM ( SELECT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM esg.tb_safety_health_comm_plan tshcp WHERE tshcp.comp_id = #{compId} AND tshcp.write_year = #{searchText} ) as exist ) AS safetyAndHealthCommPlan
